description: 根据北京岗位反哺检索 — DAG 两层, 下游 tag_filter 通过 $q_job.output.records[*].city binding 解析
planner_content: {"original_query": "根据北京岗位反哺检索", "sub_queries": [{"query_id": "q_job", "channel": "structured", "domain": "job_demand", "purpose": "北京 job records anchor", "query_text": "北京 岗位", "structured_plan": {"table_profile": "job_demand.v1", "query_profile": "job_demand.record_list"}, "tag_filters": {"regions": {"tags": ["北京"], "match_strategy": "l1|l1.5", "optional": false}}}, {"query_id": "q_downstream", "channel": "structured", "domain": "job_demand", "purpose": "downstream job list bound to upstream cities", "query_text": "绑定城市查询", "depends_on": ["q_job"], "structured_plan": {"table_profile": "job_demand.v1", "query_profile": "job_demand.record_list"}, "tag_filters": {"regions": {"tags": "$q_job.output.records[*].city", "match_strategy": "l1|l1.5", "optional": true}}}], "merge_goal": "上游 job records 城市反哺下游 tag_filter"}
